SiteMapPage.heading: サイトマップ
SiteMapPage.intro: Use this HTML sitemap to find every major Taypro page—solar panel cleaning robots, utility-scale project case studies, O&M guides, and company information. Links are grouped by content type so developers, EPC teams, and asset managers can reach the right section quickly.
SiteMapPage.introSecondary: For search engines, our XML sitemap is also available at /sitemap.xml. This page is designed for human navigation and internal linking across the Taypro site.

sections.postsIntro: Energy resource articles and reference posts published on the Taypro blog and resource hub.
sections.pagesIntro: Core marketing and product pages, including robot specifications, cleaning technology, ROI tools, legal policies, and contact.
sections.portfolioIntro: Documented solar plant installations where Taypro robotic cleaning systems are deployed—browse case studies by project name.
